description_long: This is a large commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back low-mounted wings, and three prominent turbofan engines—two under the wings and one integrated into the vertical stabilizer at the tail. The aircraft features a conventional tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is a tricycle configuration, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear visible at the front. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a multi-window canopy typical of commercial jets. The exterior is primarily gray with dark blue and red accents, and the airline branding is visible on the fuselage and tail fin.
description: A large, gray commercial jet airliner with three turbofan engines, swept low-mounted wings, and a conventional tail. The cockpit is forward-mounted, and the aircraft displays airline branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, forward fuselage, and the symmetrical spread of the wings with two underwing engines and the central tail engine visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the full length of the fuselage, the three engines (two underwing, one tail-mounted), the airline branding, and the tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, including the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the central tail engine, as well as the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the fuselage, engines, and tail, with airline branding and landing gear visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Three turbofan engines: two underwing-mounted and one tail-mounted at the base of the vertical stabilizer.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
